title: Vežba 92

fillInTheBlank.sentence:

Bob: Have you had any problems with voice recognition?

Linda: A few. The system hasn't been responding well to certain accents, and it struggles with background noise. We need to BLANK.

Bob: What about the integration with other systems? Has it been seamless?

Linda: Not entirely. It's had issues connecting with our older devices, but we're working on it. The development team has been BLANK.

Bob: That's a good start. By the way, have we tested it with real users yet?

blanks.feedback: Ovo se tiče sistema za prepoznavanje i odgovaranje na glasovne komande.
Ova napomena se odnosi na promene koje su napravljene u programu.
Ovo znači svaki mogući slučaj ili upotrebu.
Radi se o tome kako bi sistem bio precizniji i pouzdaniji.
Ovo se tiče razmišljanja i diskusije o mogućim rešenjima za probleme.
Ovo se tiče povratnih informacija prikupljenih od stvarnih korisnika, umesto teorijskih ili internih testova.

description: Ovo je pregled svih razgovora koje ste upravo pročitali.
instructions: Napišite reči ili fraze na sledećim mestima: software update, real-world feedback, all scenarios, voice command, brainstorming solutions na improve its accuracy .
